key.name: bluetooth-device-address
key.description: Bluetooth MAC address used as the proximity token.

key.name: idle-seconds
key.description: Session idle time before proximity is evaluated.

key.name: lock-delay-seconds
key.description: Extra delay before the session is locked after idle.

key.name: arrive-rssi-threshold
key.description: Minimum smoothed RSSI required to transition from away to present.

key.name: leave-rssi-threshold
key.description: Minimum smoothed RSSI required to remain present once already nearby.

key.name: sample-window
key.description: Number of RSSI samples used to compute the smoothed proximity signal.

key.name: away-grace-seconds
key.description: How long a disconnect or missing sample is tolerated before presence becomes away.

key.name: sample-interval-seconds
key.description: Interval between proactive Bluetooth presence evaluations.
